content.en:
"So that's the case, no wonder you will compete with me for Devil May Cry Sky Spider Stone!"

Ye Tian will definitely not give up and continue to increase the price.

150,000 Eternity to Gold Coins!

200,000 Eternal Gold Coins!

Soon, the price soared to 300,000 eternal gold coins, and the other party was very annoyed and threatened Ye Tian again and again, but Ye Tian ignored it.

In the end, Ye Tian won the auction at a price of 320,000 eternal gold coins.

"You wait for me!"

This Ninefold Dao Realm of the Qin Clan said coldly.

In fact, he also felt that his father's success rate was not very high, and there was a high probability that he would die, so he didn't want to buy it at all costs, otherwise it would be a waste of his own wealth.

Ye Tian was not afraid of the other party's threat at all, it was just a Ninefold Dao Realm, and he was not afraid now.

Moreover, when he cultivates to the peak realm of the sevenfold supreme Dao realm, he can impact the eightfold supreme Dao realm.

At that time, with his strength, he can be called almost invincible in the Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm, unless he encounters a demon like the Immortal Emperor Su Changsheng or the Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm who has taken the path of the strongest to the Dao, he can ignore it.

Subsequently.

It's good stuff being auctioned again.

Finally, the finale item is here.

Airplanes!

A golden leaf emerges, and this is the finale item.

Seeing this golden leaf, many of them recognized it, and they were quite excited.

"This is the Lost Gold Leaf, able to hold the Lost Gold Leaf, through the Lost Time and Space, and into the Lost Domain. Each leaf can allow a Supreme Dao Realm to stay in the Lost Domain for 10,000 Immortal Dao Era, how much it is worth, everyone should know that the auction will start now, and the starting price will be 200,000 Eternal Gold Coins!"

After the auctioneer finished speaking, a group of people from the Dao Realm began to bid.

Even Su Ya has put up a bid, which shows the preciousness of this treasure.

"Lord Su Domain, what's the matter with this Lost Golden Leaf and Lost Time and Space?"

It hadn't been long since he became an official member, and it was the first time he had seen the Lost Gold Leaf, so he didn't know much about it.

Su Ya introduced: "The Void Domain is endless, and the Lost Domain is a special area, but if you want to enter the Lost Domain, you need to pass through the Lost Time and Space, and if you don't lose the Golden Leaf, you can't enter it at all." No matter how powerful the Ninefold Dao Realm is, it can't compete with the Lost Time and Space. However, the existence that transcends the Ninefold Dao Realm can find the Lost Golden Leaf in the Lost Time and Space, so the Lost Golden Leaf is extremely precious. In addition, the Lost Gold Leaf is a consumable item, and a Lost Gold Leaf can only stay in the Lost Domain for 10,000 years to the Dao Era. "

"Is there anything good in the Lost Realm?"

Ye Tian asked again.

Su Ya said: "The Lost Domain has all kinds of treasures, and there are even treasures that are helpful for transcending the Ninefold Dao Realm, as well as the Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items. Of course, the Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item in the Lost Domain is bound to be difficult to obtain, and even if an existence like Elder Gu Yang is located, it is extremely difficult to find the Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item in the Lost Domain. Moreover, the beings who transcended the Ninefold Dao Realm did not dare to enter the Lost Realm, at most they dared to enter the Lost Time and Space. "

"Why don't you dare enter the Lost Realm?"

Ye Tian was puzzled.

"I'm afraid of causing a great terror!" Su Ya said: "What kind of great terror it is, those existences that transcend the Nine Folds to the Dao Realm have not been mentioned. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian was very interested in the Lost Domain at the moment, but he couldn't compete for the Lost Golden Leaf now, and the Eternal Gold Coin on his body was not enough.

Moreover, he can't compete with those big forces, such as the Su people, the Qin people, and so on.

Soon.

The auction price of the Lost Gold Leaf soared to 500,000 Eternity Gold Coins, and it is even soaring.

Ultimately.

It was won by a Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm of the Luo Clan at a high price of 860,000 Eternal Gold Coins.

Just when many of the Dao Realms thought that the auction was about to end, another piece of Lost Gold Leaf was taken out for auction.

"Another Lost Gold Leaf!"

Many Supreme Dao realms were amazed.

Subsequently, they began bidding again, this time for 850,000 yuan.

Then, another piece of lost gold leaf was put up for auction.

"It seems that Elder Gu Yang has found a lot of Lost Golden Leaves in the Lost Time and Space!" Ye Tian guessed.

Time passes.

This auction auctioned a total of nine Lost Gold Leaves, which made many Supreme Dao Realms extremely satisfied.

And Ye Tian didn't have any competition, of course, he didn't want to go now, after all, his strength was still too weak, if he went, it would undoubtedly be a waste of a lost golden leaf.

"After cultivating to reach the Eightfold Dao Realm, then find a way to obtain the Lost Golden Leaf and enter the Lost Domain!"

Ye Tian decided.

......

The auction ends.

Ye Tian paid for the Eternal Solstice Gold Coins, his Eternal Solstice Gold Coin was stored in the account of the Supreme Void, and it could be paid directly, and the auction items would be sent to the place where he was located, and the black-clothed guard would personally deliver them to his hands.

Winter Night's Fortress.

The black-clothed guard sent a box to Ye Tian, opened the box, and revealed the Devil May Cry Sky Spider Stone.

After confirming that it was correct, Ye Tian accepted the item.

The black-clad guard immediately left.

"Devil May Cry Sky Spider Stone, it's here!"

Ye Tian returned to the mansion and began to announce the retreat.

Then, he began refining this Devil May Cry Sky Spider Stone.

Rumble!!!!

With the help of the Devil May Cry Celestial Spider Stone, he sensed the Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule Origin contained within the Devil May Cry Celestial Spider Stone, which was far beyond the Eternal Night Black Water.

"I still underestimated the Devil May Cry Sky Spider Stone, but if you think about it carefully, it's right to kill even the Nine Realms to the Dao Realm, how terrifying the origin of the Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules contained inside will be!" Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently.

He began to comprehend the Fourth Sequence of Supreme Dao Rules.

In the process of continuous contemplation, his fourth sequence of supreme path rules slowly progressed.

Abrupt.

A wonderful voice rang out.

"Devil May Cry!"

Ye Tianming enlightened.

Rumble!

His will was directly annihilated, and this body was completely destroyed.

However, he had already severed the connection between the replicated bodies, so this Devil May Cry sound was not heard by the other replicating bodies, otherwise the other replicas would have to suffer heavy injuries if they were unwell.

After the death of the replica body, the memories were transmitted.

"What a scary Devil May Cry Sky Spider!"

Ye Tian sighed.

Next, he continued to condense his true body and copy his body to comprehend the rules of the Fourth Sequence of the Dao, but he was killed by the sound of Devil May Cry again and again.

The years passed.

Ye Tian's fourth sequence of Dao rules was gradually improved from the realm of two into six to the realm of two into seven, two into eight, two into nine, and three into the realm.

Unconsciously, tens of thousands of years have passed.

And at this moment, Ye Tian still hadn't finished consuming this Devil May Cry Sky Spider Stone.
